name: RPlog_Death_of_a_Jedi
title: The Death of a Jedi
summary: Held in a Force-suppressing holding cell aboard the SSD Malevolence, Luke Skywalker calmly awaits whatever comes, his powers temporarily gone. Director Isard observes him from a command booth alongside the impassive Commander Wallas Thurl, whom she has chosen to participate in her plan, and they debate the prisoner's value as the idealistic figurehead of the Rebellion. The Sith Warlord Vassily Korolov arrives to inspect the captive, and Thurl proposes elaborate schemes of doubles and isolation to thwart any rescue. Isard, however, opts for a simpler, crueler stroke: she floods the cell with a debilitating gas, enters, formally sentences Luke to death, and shoots him through the chest with Thurl's blaster, intending the recorded execution to be 'stolen' by rebel agents to break their morale and flush out traitors. Luke slumps dead in a pool of blood; Isard severs his artificial hand as a trophy and orders the body taken to the incinerator before strolling coldly from the cell.
